name: infichat-monorepo
description: Self-Hosted Generative AI Chatbot — Monorepo with frontend, admin, and backend

scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,FE,ADMIN -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:fe" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:ui: concurrently -n FE,ADMIN -c green,yellow "npm run dev:fe" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:api: cd backend && set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 && python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080
scripts.dev:api:venv: cd backend && set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 && venv\Scripts\python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080
scripts.build: npm run build:fe && npm run build:admin
scripts.db:up: cd infra && docker-compose up -d postgres redis chromadb
scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../admin-frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && venv\Scripts\python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:venv: cd backend && python -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.clean: cd frontend && if exist node_modules rmdir /s /q node_modules && cd ../admin-frontend && if exist node_modules rmdir /s /q node_modules && cd ../backend && if exist venv rmdir /s /q venv
